---
title: "AKFIN - Sea Ice Extent"
toc: False
---

This site presents sea ice extent across key regions in Alaska, aligned with the 
Ecosystem Management Regions supported by AKFIN. You can explore how sea ice 
changes over time, visualize recent conditions, and download data for further analysis.

## Explore the Data

Use the links below to visualize and access sea ice extent:

- [Daily Time Series of Recent Years](daily-ts.qmd)  
  Visualize recent seasonal cycles and current conditions.

- [Daily Time Series Anomalies](anomalies.qmd)  
  Compare recent conditions to the long-term average.

- [Annualized Time Series (1985–Present)](annual-ts.qmd)  
  Explore long-term trends and variability.
